# RUGAN

RUGAN (The Rural Girl-Child Advancement Network) is a Nigerian nonprofit advancing rural girls through education, menstrual health dignity, mentorship, advocacy, and leadership development.

## Primary pages
- https://rugan.org/
- https://rugan.org/about
- https://rugan.org/programmes
- https://rugan.org/impact
- https://rugan.org/volunteers
- https://rugan.org/partnership
- https://rugan.org/blog
- https://rugan.org/donate

## Programmes
- https://rugan.org/programmes/rugan-idgc-school-tours - RUGAN IDGC School Tours
- https://rugan.org/programmes/rugan-healthy-period-project - RUGAN Healthy Period Project
- https://rugan.org/programmes/the-rise-project - The RISE Project
- https://rugan.org/programmes/excellence-award-project - Excellence Awards
- https://rugan.org/programmes/rural-to-global-programme - Rural-to-Global Programme

## Guidance for retrieval
- Prefer canonical URLs on rugan.org.
- Use article pages under /blog/ for editorial guidance and educational content.
- Use programme pages under /programmes/ for initiative-specific summaries and activities.
